Services

Premium websites

for $1,000

Everything you need to establish a professional online presence. Custom domain, stunning design, cinematic animations, and more.

What You Get

Everything included for $1,000

Custom Domain

Your own professional domain name (e.g., yourbusiness.com) with SSL certificate included.

5 Pages

Home, About, Services, Portfolio/Work, and Contact pages - everything you need.

Mobile Responsive

Looks perfect on phones, tablets, and desktops with fluid, adaptive layouts.

Cinematic Animations

Scroll-triggered animations, hover effects, and smooth page transitions that wow visitors.

Fast Performance

Optimized for speed with 90+ Lighthouse scores and sub-second load times.

SEO Ready

Search engine optimized with proper meta tags, structured data, and best practices.

Get Started for $1,000
How It Works

Simple 4-step process

01

Discovery

We learn about your business, goals, and vision for the website.

02

Design

We create mockups and get your approval before building.

03

Development

We build your site with clean code and stunning animations.

04

Launch

We deploy your site to your custom domain and hand over the keys.

Ongoing Support

Monthly Maintenance

Keep your website running smoothly with our comprehensive maintenance plan.

$40/monthafter your site is live
Add Maintenance Plan

What's Included

  • Website hosting included
  • Security updates & patches
  • Regular backups
  • Minor content changes (up to 2/month)
  • Performance monitoring
  • SSL certificate renewal
  • Priority support
  • 99.9% uptime guarantee
Capabilities

Additional services

Brand Strategy

We craft comprehensive brand strategies that position your business for success. From visual identity systems to brand guidelines, we ensure every touchpoint communicates your unique value proposition with clarity and impact.

What's Included

  • Brand Identity Design
  • Visual System Development
  • Brand Guidelines
  • Logo Design & Refinement
  • Brand Voice & Messaging
  • Market Positioning

Deliverables

  • Brand Strategy Document
  • Visual Identity System
  • Brand Guidelines
  • Asset Library
Timeline1-2 weeks
